author: civanch
body:
#### PR description:
Reorganisation of Geant4 user actions is proposed according to requirements from developments carried out for simulation at GPU:

1) introduced G4Region RegionHF, in which the HF shower library is used
2) For Phase2 all filters for unwanted tracks and implementation of Russian roulette is moved to the Phase2SteppingAction. It is active at each step of G4Track.
3) Tracking and Stacking actions are updated correspondingly. 

In local tests Run3 simulation hits are identical, Phase2 simulation hits are completely different, because the different order of calls to the random number generator.

#### PR validation:
private

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for: NO
title: [Phase2 for adept
